sql_array: CREATE TABLE geospatial_data (id INT, geo GEOMETRY, name STRING);
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, geo, name) VALUES (1, bif:st_point(0, 52), 'Point A');
INSERT INTO geospatial_data (id, geo, name) VALUES (2, bif:st_polygon('POLYGON((0 50, 10 50, 10 60, 0 60, 0 50))'), 'Polygon A');
SELECT name FROM geospatial_data WHERE bif:st_contains(geo, bif:st_point(5, 55));
UPDATE geospatial_data SET geo = bif:st_polygon('POLYGON((1 51, 11 51, 11 61, 1 61, 1 51))') WHERE id = 2;
